coverage.title: Data Coverage Across Key Sectors
coverage.body: ARW Analytics publishes time-series datasets covering energy markets, oil and gas prices, electricity tariffs, commodity indices, and financial market indicators. Our datasets span Asia, the Middle East, and global markets — sourced, verified, and structured for immediate use in models, reports, and dashboards. Whether you are an analyst tracking crude oil prices, a consultant benchmarking electricity costs, or a researcher studying commodity trends, our platform provides the precise data you need. All datasets include monthly historical records, unit metadata, and are available for instant download in XLSX, CSV, PDF, and PNG chart formats.

about.heroSubtitle: ARW Analytics is a data intelligence platform built to deliver high-quality business, sector, and industry datasets to professionals, researchers, and enterprises worldwide.

mission.title: Making quality data accessible to every business
mission.body: Professional-grade data has historically been locked behind expensive subscriptions and opaque licensing. We believe that accurate, structured, and fairly priced data should be accessible to businesses of all sizes — from independent consultants to large enterprises across the globe.

values.title: Data Accuracy
values.desc: Every dataset goes through a rigorous verification process before publication. We cite our sources and flag uncertainties clearly.

values.title: Global Reach
values.desc: We cover sectors and industries across Asia, the Middle East, and global markets — with multi-currency pricing for international buyers.

values.title: Secure & Compliant
values.desc: Payments are processed securely via Razorpay. We comply with applicable data protection regulations and publish transparent legal terms.

values.title: Actionable Intelligence
values.desc: We do not just deliver raw numbers. Our products are structured to support business decisions, benchmarking, and sector research.

about.teamIllustrationAlt: The ARW Analytics team collaborating around data

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A compact team with complementary expertise across technology, data research, and finance.

members.name: Faizan
members.bio: Leads all technology development — platform architecture, frontend and backend engineering, server infrastructure, payment integration, and continuous feature delivery.

members.name: Hamid
members.bio: Drives the creation of high-quality business datasets and industry reports. Responsible for research, content structuring, data accuracy, and product development.

members.name: Rauf
members.bio: Oversees all financial operations, tax and regulatory compliance across jurisdictions, legal documentation, intellectual property, and revenue management.

structure.title: How We Operate
structure.p1: ARW Analytics functions as a data intelligence vertical under its parent company. All strategic decisions — including pricing, partnerships, and technology direction — are made by consensus among the founding partners, ensuring accountability at every level.
structure.p2: Operational responsibilities are clearly distributed: technology is owned end-to-end by Faizan, data product development by Hamid, and financial and legal affairs by Rauf. This structure keeps decision cycles short and execution sharp.
structure.p3: All datasets, reports, platform code, and intellectual property developed under the venture are jointly owned. We take IP protection seriously and enforce our licensing terms to protect both our work and our customers' rights.

cta.title: Want to work with us?

contact.responseTime: We typically respond within 1–2 business days.
